item.copperrails.copper_rail.description: A type of rail that accelerates minecarts when powered, but its speed lowers with oxidization.

lore.copperrails.waxed_weathered_copper_: A type of rail that accelerates minecarts when powered, but its speed lowers with oxidization.

lore.copperrails.rail_crossing: A type of rail that switches its direction when powered.
